creator: forums.at.alepho.com@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a successful FreeBSD 7.2-current installation on the following configuration:
- motherboard Gigabyte M61PME-S2P, with chipset nVidia GeForce 6100 + nForce 430
- CPU is AMD AM2/AM2+, Sempron
- graphical chipset nVidia GeForce 6100
- SATA disks

The system installation finished without problems: disks are recognized, network adapter works, PS2 mouse configured after the installation procedure, KDE installed and compiled from the DVD is up and running. I did not test the sound card.

Cheers,
Tomislav


Here is the dmesg:
